
### example: Threaded ATM server

*  suppose we have a server for ATMs
*  many threads for many ATMs running something like

```c
ServerLoop() {
    request = GetRequest();
    if (request->type == DEPOSIT) {
        Deposit(request->accountNumber, request->amount);
    } else if (...) {
        ...
    }
}
```

### Deposit?  {.smaller}


<pre><code>Deposit(accountNumber, amount) {
    account = <em>GetAccount(accountId)</em>;
    account-&gt;balance += amount;
    <em>SaveAccountUpdates(account);</em>
}
</code></pre>
